name: Toy Cash Register Set - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Wooden, Educational Math Playset, 17pc, Ages 3+
description:
Help them run their own little shop with the Toy Cash Register Set from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. The set features a black and white register complete with buttons, a drawer, scanner and more details for lifelike play, while fabric dollar bills and wood coins let them practice counting change and the chalk lets them keep track of their transactions. The register, coins and credit card are made from wood and painted for a charming look. Perfect for creative play, this wooden register is sure to bring a little extra fun to their day.

Celebrate the everyday with Hearth & Hand — created exclusively for Target in collaboration with Magnolia, a home and lifestyle brand by Chip & Joanna Gaines. Built upon our shared commitment to giving back to our communities, these pieces reveal the beauty of everyday moments shared with family and friends.
